notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: CreateConfiguration, GetConfiguration, GetZprConfigurationWorkRequest, ListZprConfigurationWorkRequests, ListZprConfigurationWorkRequestLogs, and ListZprConfigurationWorkRequestErrors are present in v65.110.0. Create returns only opc-work-request-id headers, Get returns the Configuration body, and the SDK does not expose list, update, or delete operations for the singleton configuration resource.

Pinned provider coverage is unconfirmed. formal/sources.lock still points at github.com/oracle/terraform-provider-oci@eb653febb1bab4cc6650a96d404a8baf36fdf671, but the accessible provider inventory did not expose a matching Configuration resource or data source. The providerResource name therefore stays a provisional OCI-style placeholder so generator-owned registry artifacts can derive stable links without claiming verified provider coverage.

Repo-authored runtime semantics stay explicit: bind-versus-create uses GetConfiguration(compartmentId) as the singleton lookup and observed-state source, create resumes only through the ZPR configuration work-request APIs, post-create drift on zprStatus or tag maps is rejected instead of inventing update semantics, and CR delete is local cleanup only because the SDK exposes no delete helper.
